creator: michael.letzgus@uni-bielefeld.de
text:
FreeBSD 9.0R, Port 3.6.5

I think this specific problem is caused by kernels memory limit (wired pages). Full description here:

http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=33111

It would be nice if winbind could recover from such a out of memory situation:

https://bugzilla.samba.org/show_bug.cgi?id=9027
